name: Roy Smalley III
transactions: June 4, 1970:Drafted by theMontreal Exposin the35th roundof the 1970 amateur draft, but did not sign.
January 13, 1971:Drafted by theBoston Red Soxin the4th roundof the 1971 amateur draft (January Secondary), but did not sign.
June 8, 1971:Drafted by theSt. Louis Cardinalsin the2nd roundof the 1971 amateur draft (June Secondary), but did not sign.
January 12, 1972:Drafted by theBoston Red Soxin the5th roundof the 1972 amateur draft (January Secondary), but did not sign.
January 9, 1974:Drafted by theTexas Rangersin the1st round(1st pick) of the 1974 amateur draft (January).
June 1, 1976:Traded by theTexas RangerswithMike Cubbage,Jim Gideon,Bill Singerand $250,000 to theMinnesota TwinsforBert BlylevenandDanny Thompson.
April 10, 1982:Traded by theMinnesota Twinsto theNew York YankeesforPaul Boris,Ron DavisandGreg Gagne.

July 18, 1984:Traded by theNew York Yankeesto theChicago White Soxfor players to be named later. TheChicago White SoxsentDoug Drabek(August 13, 1984) andKevin Hickey(August 13, 1984) to theNew York Yankeesto complete the trade.
February 19, 1985:Traded by theChicago White Soxto theMinnesota TwinsforRon Scheer(minors) andRandy Johnson.
